response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience in software engineering with a strong focus on full-stack development, AI-agent infrastructure, and open-source contributions. However, his background is more aligned with general software development and web technologies rather than specialized AI strategy or cloud platform expertise. His entrepreneurial experience (GISCollective) is promising but lacks explicit AI or cloud product leadership, which is a key requirement for this role.
strengths: 15+ years of software engineering experience across diverse domains and technologies
Strong open-source contributions and entrepreneurial experience (GISCollective)
Proven ability to deliver high-performance, low-latency applications and scalable systems
concerns: Limited explicit experience in AI strategy, cloud platform development, or leadership at director-level
No Master's/PhD in AI-related field or recognized expertise in AI products/platforms
Most recent role (re:cinq) focuses on AI-agent infrastructure rather than strategic AI/cloud differentiation
